_help: Target-market config. For each enabled market, scripts/pick_quote.py pairs the day's pre-translated quote from quotes.json with this market's hashtags/tags, and upload_youtube.py attaches the result to the SAME YouTube upload as per-language title/description ('localizations') — YouTube shows viewers the version matching their UI language. 'code' is the BCP-47 code YouTube expects and must match the translation keys in quotes.json. Hashtags/tags were drafted per-market — have a native speaker review them. Flip 'enabled' to roll a market out or back (only markets with translations in quotes.json will actually attach).

markets.name: 日本語
markets.hashtags: #名言 #モチベーション #格言 #人生

markets.name: ไทย
markets.hashtags: #คำคม #แรงบันดาลใจ #กำลังใจ #ชีวิต
tags: แรงบันดาลใจ
